# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript file with class and helper functions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/hono-base
- Safe summary: Creates factory functions for Hono app creation and middleware definition with generic Env support.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: TypeScript file with route inspection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/request/constants, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/url
- Safe summary: Provides utilities to inspect route structure, extract route paths, and calculate base paths from context.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSReadyState
- Reads as: TypeScript file with WebSocket upgrade helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/http-status
- Safe summary: Defines WebSocket context and helper to upgrade HTTP connections to WebSocket with event handling.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: TypeScript file with cookie management utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Provides get/set/delete functions for cookies including signed versions with secret-based encryption.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: TypeScript file with test client helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/client, src/helper/client/types, src/helper/context, src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/types
- Safe summary: Creates a test client for making HTTP requests to Hono apps during testing.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
- Reads as: TypeScript file with runtime detection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context
- Safe summary: Detects adapter runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, etc.) and provides environment access patterns.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
- Reads as: TypeScript file with CSS-in-JS helper

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
- Safe summary: Contains shared CSS utilities for hashing, class name generation, minification, and style string building.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: TypeScript file with proxy fetch utility
- Neighbor files: src/helper/http-exception, src/helper/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxies HTTP requests to another URL with header handling and hop-by-hop header management.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData
- Reads as: TypeScript file with route inspection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/color, src/helper/utils/handler

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: TypeScript file with HTML string helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/utils/html
- Safe summary: Escapes HTML content and provides raw HTML string building for responses.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
